design_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Cyberpunk aesthetics with Swiss Grid precision.
Emotion First: The search must feel 'intelligent' and 'alive', not static.
Content is King: AI Insights are the hero; videos are the supporting evidence.
Negative Space: Use deep black voids to make neon data pop.
Contrast: High contrast text for readability against dark backgrounds.

headings.usage: All section titles, hero text, and major KPIs.

body.usage: Paragraphs, card descriptions, and UI labels.

mono.usage: Code snippets, data values, and technical labels.

layout_strategy.global: Mobile-first, fluid containers with max-width restraints for readability.

search_page.structure: Vertical stack: Logo -> Large Input -> Suggested Queries -> Footer

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-black font-bold rounded-full hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(6,182,212,0.6)] transition-all duration-300
buttons.secondary: border border-white/10 bg-white/5 text-white rounded-full hover:bg-white/10 transition-all

cards.classes: bg-[#0A0A0A]/80 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/10 rounded-xl shadow-xl

input.search_bar: bg-black/50 border border-white/20 text-white text-lg placeholder:text-zinc-600 rounded-2xl focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary transition-all shadow-[0_0_40px_-10px_rgba(0,0,0,0.5)]

visual_enhancers.mesh_gradient: Radial gradient background for Hero section to create depth.

images.description: Abstract blue and purple light streaks for subtle background overlay

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALL: yarn add framer-motion clsx tailwind-merge
SETUP: Ensure 'Outfit' and 'DM Sans' are imported in index.css (via Google Fonts).
THEME: Force dark mode in tailwind.config.js or simply build dark-first.
CRITICAL: Do not use default Shadcn cards. Customize them to match the 'Glassmorphism Lite' style defined above.
CRITICAL: The search input must be the centerpiece. Make it large (h-16) and glowing.
LAYOUT: Use the Bento Grid strategy for the results page. The AI Insight is the 'Hero' cell.
ACCESSIBILITY: Ensure text contrast is at least 4.5:1 against the dark background. Use Zinc-400 for secondary text, not darker.
universal_guidelines: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. In frontend design, this creates what users call the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯📚🎭🎬🎪🎉🎊🎁🎀🎂🍰🎈🎨🎰💰💵💳🏦💎🪙💸🤑📊📈📉💹🔢🏆🥇 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
